datasheet.text: Each time this model makes a Normal , Advance or Fall Back move, it can move over models (excluding TITANIC models) and terrain features that are 4" or less in height as if they were not there.
datasheet.name: Titanic Advance

datasheet.text: Each time you target this model with a Stratagem , you must spend twice that Stratagem’s stated CP cost to do so.
datasheet.name: Towering Wraith Construct

datasheet.text: Each time this model Advances , do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 8" to the Move characteristic of this model.
datasheet.name: Revenant Jet Pack

unit_composition.text: cloudburst missile launcher; Revenant pulsar; sonic lance; Revenant feet.

entries.label: This model’s Revenant pulsar can be replaced with 1 sonic lance.
This model’s sonic lance can be replaced with 1 Revenant pulsar.

entries.text: While this model has 1-10 wounds remaining, subtract 8 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll .
